name: Cody Middle School Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Cody Middle School Tennis Courts in Cody, WY! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: National Guard Armory
description: Come play pickleball at National Guard Armory in Powell, WY! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are private.

name: Paul Stock Aquatic & Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Paul Stock Aquatic & Recreation Center in Cody, WY! There are 12 concrete and hard courts. 6 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, lights, water, and locker rooms.

name: Powell Outdoor Courts
description: Powell Outdoor Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Powell, WY. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.
